race.comment: SEINFELD (9) looks the one suited rising in trip at his third start. He's been good in two runs to date over shorter, sticking on gamely for second after making the pace at Seymour last time out when beaten under a length. Bred to get a trip, he should push forward and take plenty of catching. BANK HEIST (1) has been about the mark in three runs this time in, battling well on very heavy tracks his past two. He should be at peak fitness and a bit more ground should be in his favour as well. LILLARD (5) is knocking on the door with three runner up finishes in a row. Comes back slightly in trip now but will kick up and be strong late. BOLSHIE (2) best of the rest.
